title: Kanbus clock: created slide status should use attention color
description: Align created card header status color with transition card: status text should use the lighter attention color.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing status-color parity: created slide header status -> attention color (same as transition).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented: created card header status now uses attention color (same as transition card). Added test assertion for OPEN status span color on created notice. Validation: py_compile + pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (57 passed).
